{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Flowing Starlight
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] uses the [[Flowing Starlight]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Flowing Starlight]] is a technique used by [[Jai Daishou]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
